No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its various dimensions.

Zero Hunger.reason: Despite a topic on 'cuisine, recipes, diets,' there is no evidence linking the course to ending hunger or improving nutrition as per SDG 2 targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly lists 'Samopoczucie' (well-being) and 'health, healthy lifestyle, well-being' as a topic, directly aligning with Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (T4.3), develops language skills for professional settings (T4.4), and fosters 'intercultural competences' and 'international macro-perspective' for global citizenship (T4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for 'professional' settings (T8.5) and includes 'Turystyka' (tourism), which can promote sustainable tourism and local jobs (T8.9).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence found in the course description or topics that relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Developing 'intercultural competences' supports social inclusion (T10.2), and language skills facilitate the mobility of people (T10.7), indirectly contributing to reduced inequalities.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence found in the course description or topics that relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.
